phase_7_activities.step_1: Identify distinct behaviors (2: retry cap, jitter)
phase_7_activities.step_2: Create task graph YAML with 2 tasks (t1, t2)
phase_7_activities.step_3: Both tasks start at stage: red
phase_7_activities.step_5a: Task issue #1 (t1) for retry cap behavior

implementation_task_issues.title: Task t1 — Add retry cap (max 5 retries)
label: agent:task
phase:implement
sequential
implementation_task_issues.represents: One vertical TDD slice: RED → GREEN → REFACTOR

implementation_task_issues.title: Task t2 — Add jitter to backoff calculation
implementation_task_issues.behavior: Add random variation (±10%) to backoff delay
label: agent:task
phase:implement
parallel
implementation_task_issues.represents: One vertical TDD slice: RED → GREEN → REFACTOR

stage_red.activity: Write failing test, run it, confirm failure
stage_red.recorded_as: Comment on task issue titled 'Slice Update — <task_id> / red'
stage_red.issue_body_update: NO - issue remains at stage: red

stage_green.activity: Write minimal implementation, run test, confirm pass
stage_green.issue_body_update: YES - update 'Current stage' field to green
stage_green.recorded_as: Comment on task issue titled 'Slice Update — <task_id> / green'

stage_refactor.activity: Clean up code, rerun tests, confirm no regression
stage_refactor.issue_body_update: YES - update 'Current stage' field to refactor
stage_refactor.recorded_as: Comment on task issue titled 'Slice Update — <task_id> / refactor'

task_complete.activity: Issue is closed after REFACTOR stage complete

task_1_progression: refactor (Phase 8 after REFACTOR comment, issue closed)
task_2_progression: refactor (Phase 8 after REFACTOR comment, issue closed)
stage_field_transitions.stage_updates: gh issue edit <number> --body-file (updates Task Details section)

progress_recording_locations.stored_as: Comments on the same task issue, one comment per stage (RED, GREEN, REFACTOR)
progress_recording_locations.issue_timeline: Chronological comments showing full history of each vertical slice

phase_7_workflow_rule: Identify distinct behaviours. Each behaviour becomes one vertical slice. Do not write all RED slices before any GREEN slices.
phase_8_workflow_rule: For each task issue: write failing test (RED), record comment, update stage to green, write implementation (GREEN), record comment, update stage to refactor, clean up (REFACTOR), record comment, close issue.
key_rule: Each task issue accumulates exactly 3 comments (one per RED/GREEN/REFACTOR stage). Stage field in issue body is updated in-place as work progresses.
references_cited: workflow.md lines 210 (Phase 7 Step 1 - identify distinct behaviors)
workflow.md line 214 (Phase 7 Step 5 - create one issue per vertical slice)
